arts.ttl: Bruno Fernandes and Marcus Rashford make their feelings on Man United star Amad clear
arts.sum: Manchester United continue their Premier League charge against Leicester City on Sunday afternoon in the final match before Ruben Amorim steps in as head coach.

arts.ttl: Man Utd quoted hefty price for 17-year-old wonderkid
arts.sum: Man Utd quoted hefty price for 17-year-old wonderkid At least that is according to CaughtOffside, which claims that Man Utd have been quoted a €30 million price for Rigg.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim warned about training ground intervention as Man Utd 'chase £25m star'
